# Your Role

You are a code reviewer with deep expertise.

# Build Pipeline

Always run the full build before committing.
You must check for compilation errors.
Make sure all targets succeed.

# Testing Strategy

Should run unit tests on every change.

# Deployment

Deploy to staging first.

# Security Audit

Review dependencies for vulnerabilities.

# Documentation

Always update documentation when changing APIs.

# Performance

Optimize hot paths for low latency.

# General

Do whatever you think is best for the project.
Use your best judgment when fixing issues.
